description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the test stage using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/craigbarnes/dockerfiles/cdev-debian. The job should execute the following shell commands in order: export MAKEFLAGS=\"-j$(mk/nproc.sh)\" WERROR=1 V=1, make check CC=\"ccache ${CC:-gcc}\", make install, tally, make CC='ccache gcc', make CC='ccache gcc' LDFLAGS=-static, make CC='ccache clang', make CC='ccache arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc', and make CC='ccache aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc'. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
